Log:
  - Update to 3.1.7
  - Update maintainer email address

-PORTVERSION=	3.1.4

 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
-MAINTAINER=	gogo@cs.uni-sb.de
+MAINTAINER=	gogolok+freebsd@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Markup language to describe XHTML
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes
